Cursorc
Calling "Gdk.Cursor(display, cursor_type)" has been deprecated. Please use Gdk.Cursor.new_for_display(display, cursor_type). See: https://wiki.gnome.org/PyGObject/InitializerDeprecations
Calling "Gdk.Cursor(display, pixbuf, x, y)" has been deprecated. Please use Gdk.Cursor.new_from_pixbuf(display, pixbuf, x, y). See: https://wiki.gnome.org/PyGObject/InitializerDeprecations
Wrong number of parametersz
Calling "Gdk.Cursor(source, mask, fg, bg, x, y)" has been deprecated. Please use Gdk.Cursor.new_from_pixmap(source, mask, fg, bg, x, y). See: https://wiki.gnome.org/PyGObject/InitializerDeprecations)
